/usr/bin/g++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,libManifoldPlus.so.1 -o libManifoldPlus.so.1.4 CMakeFiles/ManifoldPlus.dir/src/IO.cc.o CMakeFiles/ManifoldPlus.dir/src/Intersection.cc.o CMakeFiles/ManifoldPlus.dir/src/Manifold.cc.o CMakeFiles/ManifoldPlus.dir/src/MeshProjector.cc.o CMakeFiles/ManifoldPlus.dir/src/Octree.cc.o CMakeFiles/ManifoldPlus.dir/src/Parser.cc.o
